overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a female adventurer exploring a tropical jungle village with wooden stilt structures, dirt paths, and waterfront market areas. The character moves through various zones including a wooden platform square, jungle trails, a bridge over water, and an interior market building.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden village square with string lights and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden village square passing villagers seated at tables and browsing market stalls

notable_agents.action: villager in blue shirt standing near green plastic chairs
villager sitting at wooden table under string lights

entered.detail: red painted sign reading PUERCO on corrugated metal building
weathered wooden planks forming elevated village walkway
overhead string lights crisscrossing above the square
yellow painted wooden building with exterior stairs
wooden tables and stalls with goods and red barrels

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling wooden village square built on elevated platforms. Overhead string lights crisscross between structures while villagers stand and sit around green plastic chairs and wooden tables. A red sign reading PUERCO is visible on the left as the character moves forward through the semi-covered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: jungle dirt path with scattered settlement structures

events.description: transitions from wooden platform to dirt ground surrounded by dense jungle vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along uneven dirt path through jungle settlement area with scattered villagers

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the dirt path carrying items

entered.detail: uneven dirt path with rocks, debris, and exposed roots
dense tropical plants, palm trees, and jungle undergrowth
derelict colorful bus partially hidden by vegetation
burning campfire with red container and wooden bench nearby

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wooden platform behind, the character descends onto a dirt trail cutting through dense jungle vegetation. The path is scattered with rocks and debris, with an abandoned colorful bus visible in the background. A campfire burns to the right as the character continues through the more open jungle settlement area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge walkway over water between stilt houses

events.description: steps onto wooden bridge crossing over water between stilt houses
passes red and white painted sign reading KULU YAKU on left side of bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing wooden bridge over water passing villagers and market stalls

notable_agents.action: person sitting in small boat on the water beside the bridge
villager standing near blue tarp covered stall

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge with rope railings over water
wooden houses built on stilts over the water with corrugated roofs
murky green water flowing beneath the bridge walkway
red and white painted sign on stilt house reading KULU YAKU
market stall with blue tarp covering and wooden counter

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a narrow wooden bridge spanning a water canal between stilt houses. The walkway is lined with rope railings and passes by a blue tarp market stall. A large red and white sign reading KULU YAKU is painted on a building to the left as the character crosses over the murky water below.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior market hut with hanging meat and vendors

events.description: enters interior of wooden market building from the bridge
approaching open doorway with bright natural light from waterfront side

agents.ego_description: entering market building and walking past vendors preparing goods and hanging meat

notable_agents.action: vendor working at wooden table preparing meat and goods
woman sweeping the wooden floor inside the market

entered.detail: enclosed wooden structure with corrugated metal roof and hanging bulbs
large cuts of meat and fish hanging from wooden ceiling beams
rough wooden tables with bowls, goods, and chopping blocks
large opening at far end leading back to waterfront view

segments.scene_description: Entering a dimly lit wooden market building, the character walks past vendors working at rough wooden tables. Large cuts of meat hang from the ceiling beams on the left. The space is illuminated by hanging bulbs and natural light filtering through openings, with an exit doorway at the far end revealing the waterfront outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling elevated village square into the dense jungle and finally into a dimly lit interior market. It begins on wooden platforms beneath crisscrossing string lights, passing villagers gathered around plastic chairs and a red sign reading PUERCO. As the character leaves the platforms, the scene shifts to a rocky dirt trail cutting through thick jungle vegetation, passing a burning campfire and an abandoned colorful bus. The path then leads onto a narrow wooden bridge with rope railings that spans a murky canal, gliding past a blue tarp stall and a large red and white KULU YAKU sign. Finally, the camera moves from the open air into a shadowed wooden market building where cuts of meat hang from the ceiling beams before the view opens toward a distant waterfront exit.
